title: Collective charge measurement in quantum dot chains: controlling barrier occupation and tunneling current
summary: We investigate nonequilibrium transport in a triple-quantum-dot (TQD) system, where the central dot acts as a discrete tunnel barrier, subject to continuous monitoring by a quantum point contact (QPC) that is capacitively coupled to all three dots with independently tunable strengths. We show that this global measurement scheme affects transport in a qualitatively distinct manner from single-site measurement. By engineering structured dephasing, measurement provides a significant improvement in the barrier occupation and tunneling current. In the strong-measurement limit, the steady state becomes independent of the underlying Hamiltonian parameters, and the barrier occupation can approach 1/2 for suitable measurement configurations. We identify an optimal measurement configuration that maximizes the steady-state current and show that near-optimal performance can be achieved with a simple central-dot readout scheme.

AI.tldr: 研究了三量子点系统中全局连续量子点接触测量对非平衡输运的影响，发现全局测量可显著提高势垒占据和隧穿电流，强测量下稳态与哈密顿量参数无关，势垒占据可达1/2，并找到了最优测量配置。
AI.motivation: 探索全局测量（同时对多个量子点进行测量）与单点测量在量子输运中的定性差异，以及如何通过设计结构化退相干来改善势垒占据和隧穿电流。
AI.method: 理论分析三量子点（TQD）系统，中心点作为离散隧道势垒，量子点接触（QPC）电容耦合至三个量子点，通过独立可调耦合强度实现全局连续监测，分析不同测量配置下的稳态输运特性。
AI.result: 全局测量显著改善势垒占据和隧穿电流；强测量极限下稳态与哈密顿量参数无关，势垒占据可达1/2；找到了最优测量配置可最大化稳态电流，且简单的中心点读出方案可接近最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 全局测量方案在量子输运控制中具有独特优势，通过设计测量配置可有效调控量子点系统的输运特性，为量子器件中的测量诱导控制提供了新思路。

title: Optical control of conductivity type and valley polarization via persistent photoconductivity in (Pb,Sn)Se quantum wells
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures in the main text + 6 pages, 8 figures in supplemental material; data is available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20155927
summary: The ability to tune the Fermi level of semiconductors is at the heart of modern electronics. Here, we demonstrate that persistent photoconductivity (PPC) enables tuning of carrier density, conductivity type, and, consequently, the valley polarization in (Pb,Sn)Se/(Pb,Eu)Se quantum wells. Illumination of these samples induces Fermi level shifts that convert the system from a threefold-degenerate $\bar{M}$-valley two-dimensional hole gas to a single $\barΓ$-valley-polarized electron gas with similar values of mobility. The optically induced state persists for more than $10^{3}$ minutes at cryogenic temperatures and enables stepwise optical gating without the need for device processing. These transitions are confirmed by the sign inversion of the Hall slope and the modification of quantum Hall plateau degeneracies measured in magnetic fields up to 35 T. Landau level $k\cdot p$ model calculations quantitatively reproduce the experimental data. Furthermore, studies of weak-field magnetoresistance demonstrate the significance of quantum localization phenomena at the transition between the weakly and strongly localized regimes in compensated narrow-gap semiconductors. Spectral studies allow us to identify the critical role of the barrier material and determine the photon energies that can reverse the PPC effect. The persistent light-induced upward shift of the Fermi level in the $p$-type quantum well is explained in terms of specific energy positions of donor and acceptor defect states in the studied system. Our results demonstrate that PPC is a powerful optical gating tool for the IV-VI quantum wells, a versatile platform for reconfigurable valleytronic architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了在(Pb,Sn)Se/(Pb,Eu)Se量子阱中，持续光电导(PPC)效应能够调控载流子密度、导电类型以及谷极化，实现从三重简并的空穴气到单谷极化电子气的可逆转变，为可重构谷电子学提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 现代电子学的核心在于调控半导体的费米能级。作者希望通过PPC效应实现对IV-VI族量子阱中载流子类型和谷极化的光学调控，避免传统器件加工步骤。
AI.method: 利用持续光电导效应进行光学门控，结合霍尔测量、量子霍尔效应、弱场磁阻及Landau能级k·p模型计算，系统研究了光照引起的费米能级移动和载流子类型转变。
AI.result: 光照将三重简并的M-谷二维空穴气转变为单谷极化的Γ-谷电子气，迁移率相近；光致态在低温下持续>10³分钟；霍尔斜率符号反转和量子霍尔平台简并度改变证实了转变；弱场磁阻揭示了弱局域化与强局域化之间的量子局域化现象。
AI.conclusion: PPC是IV-VI族量子阱中一种强大的光学门控工具，可用于构建可重构的谷电子学器件。

title: Transconductance as a Probe of Valley Thermodynamics in Multilayer WSe$_2$
summary: Transconductance is a central figure of merit in field-effect transistors, typically governed by charge accumulation and carrier mobility. In multilayer WSe$_2$ transistors, however, it is shown to carry a nonlinear transport signature of inter-valley carrier redistribution between the $K$ and $Γ$ valleys. This valley-crossover contribution suppresses transconductance in bilayer WSe$_2$ and reverses sign in trilayer, while remaining absent in single-valley systems. Unlike extrinsic mechanisms such as trap-state filling or contact resistance, the anomaly leaves the subthreshold swing unchanged and cannot be reproduced within conventional single-valley transport models. Introducing the valley susceptibility $χ_v \equiv \partial f_Γ/\partial V_{\rm GS}$, bounded by an intrinsic thermodynamic limit $(4k_BT)^{-1}$, we quantify this response and show that it reaches ${\sim}0.20\,\mathrm{V}^{-1}$ in bilayer WSe$_2$ near threshold at room temperature. The sign, magnitude, and temperature dependence of the anomaly provide directly measurable fingerprints of valley thermodynamics, establishing transconductance as an electrical probe of internal electronic degrees of freedom and revealing a previously hidden nonlinear response in standard transistor measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多层WSe₂晶体管中跨导存在非线性的谷间载流子重新分布特征，提出了谷磁化率概念，将跨导建立为探测内部电子自由度的电学探针。
AI.motivation: 传统场效应晶体管中跨导由电荷积累和载流子迁移率决定，但在多层WSe₂中出现了无法用单谷模型解释的异常跨导行为，需要揭示其背后的物理机制。
AI.method: 通过实验测量多层WSe₂晶体管的跨导异常，引入谷磁化率χ_v≡∂f_Γ/∂V_GS，并结合热力学极限(4k_BT)^{-1}进行量化分析。
AI.result: 发现跨导异常在双层WSe₂中抑制跨导、在三层中反转符号，单谷体系中不存在；谷磁化率在室温下达到约0.20 V^{-1}；该异常不改变亚阈值摆幅。
AI.conclusion: 跨导异常可作为谷热力学的直接可测量指纹，揭示了标准晶体管测量中隐藏的非线性响应，建立了跨导作为内部电子自由度电学探针的方法。

title: Harnessing hidden quantum metric response in a 2D magnet via nonlocal photovoltaic effect
summary: The quantum geometry of Bloch wavefunctions underpins a wealth of emergent phenomena in quantum materials. Its imaginary part, the Berry curvature, has long been recognized as a key source for hallmark effects such as quantum Hall and topological phenomena, etc. The real part of quantum geometry, the quantum metric, has recently garnered considerable attention due to predictions of a range of unconventional nonlinear and nonequilibrium responses. Such responses usually vanish in centrosymmetric systems, largely restricting relevant studies to non-centrosymmetric materials. Here we challenge this convention by revealing that the vanished quantum metric response can survive in a hidden form. Using a non-local photovoltaic scheme in a layered magnetic semiconductor, we spatially separate mutually compensating photocurrents and thereby detect such hidden quantum metric response. We demonstrate this effect across distinct magnetic states and down to the ultrathin limit. Moreover, we realize reconfigurable, nonvolatile and probabilistic photodetection enabled by the quantum metric response. These results not only fundamentally expand the material landscape for quantum geometric physics, but also open new gateway to harvest the quantum geometric contributions for state-of-the-art nonvolatile reprogrammable sensing and computing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了量子度规响应在中心对称材料中消失的传统认知，通过在层状磁性半导体中采用非局域光伏方案，空间分离相互补偿的光电流，从而探测到隐藏的量子度规响应，并实现了可重构、非易失性和概率性光电探测。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为量子度规响应在中心对称体系中会消失，这极大限制了相关研究范围。作者希望突破这一限制，证明即使在中心对称材料中，量子度规响应也可以以隐藏形式存在。
AI.method: 采用非局域光伏方案，在层状磁性半导体中空间分离相互补偿的光电流，从而检测到隐藏的量子度规响应。实验覆盖不同磁态直至超薄极限。
AI.result: 成功探测到隐藏的量子度规响应，并在不同磁态和超薄极限下验证了该效应；实现了基于量子度规响应的可重构、非易失性和概率性光电检测。
AI.conclusion: 该发现从根本上拓展了量子几何物理的材料体系范围，为利用量子几何贡献实现先进非易失性可重构传感与计算应用开辟了新途径。

title: Detecting vortex motion through spatially correlated nonequilibrium noise
summary: Resistive transport near a superconducting phase can arise from the motion of normal-state quasiparticles or that of vortices. The conductivity alone does not distinguish between these mechanisms. We propose an unambiguous method for telling them apart, using the recently developed experimental tool of covariance magnetometry, which uses nitrogen-vacancy centers in diamond to probe real-time spatiotemporal correlations in magnetic noise. Our key insight is that, under an applied current, the underlying charge carriers leave a directional fingerprint in the spatially correlated magnetic noise above the sample: ordinary electric carriers drift parallel to the current, whereas vortices, owing to the Magnus force, drift perpendicular to it. The noise covariance detects this anisotropy and identifies the vortex-driven nature of transport. We compute the noise correlations expected for a representative thin-film superconductor and demonstrate that the anisotropic signal is well within the reach of current experimental capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用协方差磁强计技术，通过探测超导体上方磁噪声的空间相关性各向异性，来区分电阻输运是由正常态准粒子还是涡旋运动引起的。
AI.motivation: 传统电导率测量无法区分超导相附近的电阻输运是源于正常态准粒子运动还是涡旋运动，需要一种明确的判别方法。
AI.method: 利用基于金刚石NV色心的协方差磁强计技术，探测样品上方实时磁噪声的时空相关性。在外加电流下，正常载流子平行于电流漂移，而涡旋因马格纳斯力垂直于电流漂移，产生不同的各向异性磁噪声指纹。
AI.result: 计算了代表性薄膜超导体的噪声相关性，证明各向异性信号在当前实验能力可及范围内。
AI.conclusion: 协方差磁强计能够有效区分涡旋驱动与准粒子驱动的输运，为超导输运机制研究提供了新的实验工具。

title: Cavity-modified exciton-exciton annihilation in disordered molecular systems
comment: 25 pages and 5 figures (main text) 36 pages and 14 figures (supporting information)
summary: Recent experiments have shown contradictory effects of strong light-matter coupling on exciton-exciton annihilation (EEA) in organic molecular systems. In this work, we perform numerical simulations of polariton dynamics and reveal the role of strong coupling in changing the EEA rate. The results of our simulations suggest that strong coupling allows to partially overcome disorder in systems with poor exciton mobility via delocalisation of excitons owing to the interaction with the common cavity mode. This leads to an enhanced connectivity between excitons and, consequently, to an increase in the EEA rate. Conversely, in systems with high exciton mobility, in which disorder has a much smaller effect on excitation energy transfer, excitons can interact strongly even without coupling to the cavity photons at the exciton densities at which EEA typically occurs. In this case, the EEA rate can be even lower than in bare molecules due to the existence of a competing decay channel associated with photon leakage through the cavity mirrors. We also find that in the weak coupling regime, the EEA rate appears to be suppressed due to this decay channel regardless of the exciton transport properties. Our simulations resolve the experimental controversy on the effect of strong coupling on EEA and provide guidance for minimising the EEA rate towards a more feasible realisation of Bose-Einstein condensation of polaritons.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值模拟揭示了强光-物质耦合对激子-激子湮灭(EEA)速率的双重作用：在无序体系中，强耦合通过空腔模式离域化增强激子连接性，从而提高EEA速率；在高迁移率体系中，强耦合通过光子泄露的竞争衰变通道降低EEA速率。弱耦合下EEA速率始终受光子泄露抑制。该研究解决了实验争议，并为优化EEA速率以实现玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚提供了指导。
AI.motivation: 近期的实验显示了强光-物质耦合对有机分子系统中激子-激子湮灭(EEA)存在矛盾的影响，作者希望通过数值模拟澄清这一争议。
AI.method: 对极化激元动力学进行数值模拟，研究强耦合在不同无序程度和激子迁移率的体系中对EEA速率的影响。
AI.result: 1) 在无序、低迁移率体系中，强耦合通过空腔模式离域化增强激子连接性，提高EEA速率；2) 在高迁移率体系中，强耦合下光子泄露的竞争衰变通道反而降低EEA速率；3) 弱耦合下光子泄露始终抑制EEA速率。
AI.conclusion: 模拟结果解决了关于强耦合对EEA影响的实验争议，并为最小化EEA速率、实现极化激元玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚提供了指导原则。

title: Floquet-Engineered Odd-Parity Altermagnetic Higher-Order Topology in a Two-Dimensional Antiferromagnet Cr$_2$CH$_2$
summary: Periodic driving provides a platform to dynamically tailor quantum states of matter, yet its impact on symmetry-protected topological phases remains incompletely understood. Here, we demonstrate that periodic driving enables the realization of an odd-parity altermagnetic (AM) higher-order topological insulator (HOTI) phase in the Cr$_2$CH$_2$ monolayer. In equilibrium, Cr$_2$CH$_2$ is a 2D antiferromagnetic (AFM) HOTI protected by $\mathcal C_3$ rotational symmetry, characterized by a symmetry indicator $χ^{(3)}$ = $\{-2,1\}$ and robust corner states. Under circularly polarized light (CPL), the system develops a f-wave altermagnetic state governed by the symmetry $[C_{2}||\overline{3}_{001}]$ with odd-parity spin splitting. Despite substantial Floquet-induced band renormalization, the $\mathcal C_3$-protected corner states remain intact over a broad range of driving strengths, highlighting the altermagnetic higher-order topology under Floquet driving. As the light intensity increases, the system gradually evolves into an altermagnetic semimetallic state. These results establish a direct connection between magnetism and topology in a periodically driven AFM system, offering a route toward the control of coupled spin and topological transport.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了圆偏振光可以将Cr₂CH₂单层从反铁磁高阶拓扑绝缘体驱动为奇宇称交错磁高阶拓扑绝缘体，同时保持C₃保护的角态不变，并最终演变为交错磁半金属态。
AI.motivation: 周期性驱动对对称性保护拓扑相的影响尚未完全理解，作者希望探索光驱动如何调控磁性拓扑材料。
AI.method: 利用圆偏振光(CPL)周期性驱动Cr₂CH₂单层，结合对称性分析和Floquet理论，研究能带重整化与拓扑性质变化。
AI.result: 实现了奇宇称交错磁高阶拓扑绝缘体相，具有f-wave交错磁序和[C₂||\overline{3}₀₀₁]对称性；C₃保护的角态在宽驱动强度范围内保持稳定；随光强增加演变为交错磁半金属态。
AI.conclusion: 建立了周期性驱动反铁磁体系中磁性与拓扑之间的直接联系，为调控自旋与拓扑输运提供了新途径。

title: Imaging stripe dynamics in trilayer nickelate La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$
summary: Since the discovery of high-temperature superconductivity in nickelate superconductors, it is an open question how closely the superconducting state resembles that of cuprate superconductors. One salient feature of the phase diagram of the high-temperature cuprate superconductors is stripe order. Despite their prevalence, real-space imaging has been limited to the charge sector. Here we use spin-polarised scanning tunnelling microscopy to visualize the local magnetic and charge distribution emerging due to a stripe order in the trilayer nickelate La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$. The stripe order exhibits a four unit cell periodicity, closely resembling that seen in cuprates, and opens a near-complete $\sim66\mathrm{meV}$ gap at the Fermi level. Crucially, discrete phase slips can be triggered by tunneling electrons above a $\sim 20\mathrm{meV}$ threshold, allowing imaging of stripe dynamics at the atomic scale. These results highlight the importance of correlation physics driving stripe-like orders in lanthanum nickelates with striking similarities to the cuprates.

AI.tldr: 本文利用自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜在La₄Ni₃O₁₀中观测到了类似铜氧化物超导体的条纹有序结构，该条纹具有四晶胞周期，在费米能级处打开约66 meV的能隙，且可在约20 meV阈值下触发离散相滑移，实现原子尺度的条纹动力学成像。
AI.motivation: 自镍基超导体中发现高温超导以来，其超导态与铜氧化物超导体的相似程度一直悬而未决。铜氧化物高温超导体的一个显著特征是条纹有序，但此前实空间成像局限于电荷通道，因此需要从自旋通道探索镍基超导体中是否存在类似条纹有序。
AI.method: 采用自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜（SP-STM）对三层镍酸盐La₄Ni₃O₁₀进行实空间成像，观测条纹有序导致的局域磁性和电荷分布，并通过隧穿电子触发离散相滑移来研究条纹动力学。
AI.result: 观察到具有四晶胞周期的条纹有序，在费米能级处打开约66 meV的近完全能隙；隧穿电子可在约20 meV阈值以上触发离散相滑移，实现了原子尺度的条纹动力学成像。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，镧镍氧化物中驱动条纹有序的关联物理与铜氧化物超导体具有显著相似性，强调了关联电子学在镍基超导中的重要角色。

title: Non-Gaussianity of random quantum states
summary: We study the fermionic non-Gaussianity in typical quantum states, focusing on Haar random states of qubits with or without a global $U(1)$ symmetry. Using the Weingarten calculus, we derive analytical predictions for the non-Gaussianity, defined as the relative entropy between the reduced density matrix and its Gaussianized counterpart. We identify two regimes controlled by the ratio between the subsystem and the system size, $\ell/L$. For $\ell/L < 1/2$, the non-Gaussianity vanishes in the absence of symmetries, because typical reduced density matrices are exponentially close to the maximally mixed state. In the presence of a global $U(1)$ symmetry, instead, it remains small but finite. By contrast, in the regime $\ell/L > 1/2$, the non-Gaussianity becomes extensive. These results establish the typical scaling of fermionic non-Gaussianity in random states and analyze how this is modified by the presence of global symmetries.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了量子比特Haar随机态（有无全局U(1)对称性）中的费米子非高斯性，发现子系统与系统大小比ℓ/L < 1/2时，无对称性下非高斯性消失，有对称性时仍小但有限；ℓ/L > 1/2时非高斯性变得广泛。
AI.motivation: 理解典型量子态中费米子非高斯性的标度行为，以及全局对称性如何影响这一性质。
AI.method: 利用Weingarten微积分进行解析推导，以相对熵定义非高斯性，研究有无全局U(1)对称性的Haar随机态。
AI.result: ℓ/L < 1/2时，无对称性下典型约化密度矩阵指数接近最大混合态，非高斯性消失；有U(1)对称性时非高斯性小但有限。ℓ/L > 1/2时，非高斯性变得广泛。
AI.conclusion: 建立了随机态中费米子非高斯性的典型标度规律，并揭示了全局对称性对其的修正作用。

title: Atomistic Modeling of Chemical Disorder in Materials: Bridging Classical Methods and AI-Assisted Approaches
summary: Chemical disorder, originating from the mixed occupation of crystallographic sites by multiple elements, is widespread in alloys, ceramics, and compositionally complex materials, where short- and long-range orderings can strongly influence properties. A central obstacle is the representation gap between experiments and simulations: experiments often report disorder as partial occupancies and ensemble-averaged behaviors, whereas atomistic simulations and AI workflows usually require fully specified configurations. Tackling this gap requires computational methods that convert averaged disorder descriptions into representative configurational ensembles while balancing cost, bias, and fidelity. This challenge has become more urgent in AI-driven computational discovery, where ignoring disorder may cause AI workflows to misrank stability, misjudge novelty, and misdirect experiments with too-idealized representations. This Review highlights how classical and AI-driven methods can bridge this representation gap. We assess the strengths and limitations of approaches spanning mean-field theories, cluster expansion, quasi-random approximations, Monte Carlo, and emerging schemes powered by universal interatomic potentials and generative models. We further highlight how AI can accelerate classical computational schemes by lowering the cost of microstate evaluation, configurational exploration, and atomistic-to-thermodynamic closure. We also emphasize how AI can enable disorder-native capabilities, including workflow triage, ordering-sensitive and alchemical representations, generative models of disordered structures and distributions, and kinetics-aware disorder prediction. Together, this framework outlines a practical roadmap toward disorder-native AI, which can transform chemical disorder from a representational obstacle into a controllable variable for realistic AI-accelerated materials discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评述了化学无序（如合金、陶瓷等材料中多元素混合占据晶格位点）在实验与计算模拟之间的表征鸿沟问题，并探讨了经典方法与AI驱动方法如何弥合这一鸿沟，最终提出迈向“无序原生AI”的路线图。
AI.motivation: 实验上化学无序常以部分占据和系综平均行为报告，而原子模拟和AI工作流需要完全指定的构型，这一表征鸿沟导致AI驱动的材料发现可能误判稳定性、新颖性并误导实验方向。
AI.method: 评述了平均场理论、团簇展开、准随机近似、蒙特卡洛等经典方法，以及通用原子间势、生成模型等新兴AI方案，并分析了AI如何加速经典方法（降低微态评估成本、构型探索、原子-热力学闭合）以及如何赋能无序原生能力（工作流分流、序敏感表征、无序结构生成模型、动力学感知预测）。
AI.result: 明确了各类方法的优劣，展示了AI在降低计算成本、提升构型探索效率方面的能力，并指出AI可以赋予材料研究对化学无序的原生处理能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出了将化学无序从表征障碍转变为可控变量的“无序原生AI”框架，为AI加速材料发现提供了实用路线图。

title: Non-Bloch Quantum Geometry of Non-Hermitian Systems
summary: We formulate quantum geometry for non-Hermitian systems under open boundary conditions. By defining quantum-geometric quantities in both real-space and non-Bloch representations, we establish a unified framework beyond conventional Bloch band theory. Our central result is an exact equivalence between the real-space integrated quantum metric and a non-Bloch integrated quantum metric defined on the generalized Brillouin zone. We further introduce localized non-Bloch Wannier functions in the presence of the non-Hermitian skin effect and show that the non-Bloch integrated quantum metric gives the gauge-invariant part of their spread functional. These results establish quantum geometry as a natural framework for characterizing open-boundary non-Hermitian band structures and the localization properties encoded in skin modes.

AI.tldr: 本文为非厄米系统在开放边界条件下建立了量子几何框架，通过实空间与非Bloch表示的对应关系，证明了广义布里渊区上的非Bloch量子度量与实空间积分量子度量等价，并引入局域化非Bloch Wannier函数来刻画趋肤模的扩展性质。
AI.motivation: 传统 Bloch 能带理论难以处理开放边界条件下的非厄米系统（特别是趋肤效应），需要建立统一的量子几何框架来描述其能带结构和模式局域化特性。
AI.method: 在实空间和非Bloch表示中分别定义量子几何量，利用广义布里渊区建立两者之间的精确等价关系，并引入非Bloch Wannier函数分析趋肤模的扩展性质。
AI.result: 证明了实空间积分量子度量与非Bloch积分量子度量严格等价；非Bloch积分量子度量是局域化Wannier函数扩展泛函的规范不变部分。
AI.conclusion: 量子几何为开放边界非厄米能带结构和趋肤模局域化性质提供了自然的描述框架。

title: Signatures of Gaussian superconducting fluctuations in nonlocal noise magnetometry
summary: We calculate the two-point magnetic noise spectrum arising from Gaussian superconducting fluctuations, a quantity directly measurable by spin qubit pairs such as nitrogen vacancy centers in diamond. The analysis utilizes the time-dependent Ginzburg-Landau theory, reflecting the direct contribution of fluctuating Cooper pairs to the current correlations and consequent magnetic noise. We treat both two-dimensional systems and wires, considering them in equilibrium and under a uniform electric field. The signal is expected to be strongest in high-temperature superconductors, and we contrast our findings with the predicted signatures of a vortex liquid to offer an additional route to elucidate the nature of fluctuations in these systems.

AI.tldr: 本文利用含时金兹堡-朗道理论计算了由高斯超导涨落引起的两点磁噪声谱，该量可直接通过自旋量子比特对（如金刚石中的氮空位中心）测量。研究考虑了二维系统和纳米线在平衡态及均匀电场下的情况，预测高温超导体信号最强，并与涡旋液体的特征对比，为理解超导涨落本质提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 提供一种通过磁噪声测量（利用自旋量子比特对）来探测超导涨落的新方法，并区分不同涨落机制（如高斯涨落与涡旋液体）。
AI.method: 采用含时金兹堡-朗道理论，计算由涨落库珀对贡献的电流关联函数及相应的磁噪声谱，分析二维体系和纳米线在平衡态及电场下的行为。
AI.result: 预测磁噪声信号在高温超导体中最强，给出了与涡旋液体特征不同的噪声谱签名。
AI.conclusion: 磁噪声测量可以作为区分高斯超导涨落与涡旋液体的有效实验手段，为理解高温超导体中的涨落本质提供新视角。

title: Importance of nuclear quantum effects on the structure of supercooled water around its liquid--liquid critical point
summary: Supercooled water is expected to exhibit a liquid--liquid phase transition between low- and high-density liquid states, possibly terminating in a liquid--liquid critical point in the experimentally difficult no man's land. Because the hydrogen atoms are light, nuclear quantum effects (NQE) may alter the structural signatures used to identify this transition. Here, we compare classical molecular dynamics and path-integral molecular dynamics simulations of a flexible q-TIP4P/F-like water model in the deeply supercooled regime. The classical simulations show a pronounced density change at 180 K between 180 and 220 MPa, whereas the path-integral simulations exhibit a smoother pressure dependence. Radial distribution functions and bond-order parameters show that NQE broaden pair correlations, reduce the tetrahedral order of the first hydration shell, and slightly increase the Steinhardt $Q_6$ parameter. These results demonstrate that NQE modify both low- and high-density liquid structures and therefore need to be included when interpreting structural signatures of the liquid--liquid transition in supercooled water.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过经典分子动力学和路径积分分子动力学模拟，发现核量子效应会显著改变过冷水液-液相变的结构特征，使密度变化更平滑、降低四面体有序度、增宽对关联函数，因此在解释液-液转变时必须考虑核量子效应。
AI.motivation: 过冷水中的液-液临界点实验测量困难，而氢原子较轻会导致核量子效应可能改变用于识别该相变的结构特征，因此需要评估NQE对结构信号的影响。
AI.method: 采用q-TIP4P/F-like柔性水模型，在深度过冷区分别进行经典分子动力学模拟和路径积分分子动力学模拟，对比两种方法下密度变化、径向分布函数和键序参数等结构特征。
AI.result: 经典模拟在180K、180-220 MPa间显示明显密度变化，而路径积分模拟的密度变化更平滑；NQE拓宽了成对关联、降低了第一水合层的四面体有序度、略微增加了Steinhardt Q6参数。
AI.conclusion: NQE同时改变了低密度和高密度液体的结构，因此在解释过冷水液-液转变的结构信号时必须纳入核量子效应的考量。

title: Diversity-Aware Batch-Mode Active Learning for Efficient Sampling in Data-Driven Constitutive Modeling
summary: The constitutive behavior of materials is modeled through relationships between stress, strain, and possibly additional internal variables. This results in relatively high-dimensional feature spaces for machine learning models rendering the efficient generation of informative datasets essential as brute force methods suffer from the curse of dimensionality. This work introduces a diversity-aware batch-mode query-by-committee active-learning strategy to generate datasets of maximum information content at minimum cost. In contrast to existing methods, this novel method selects multiple informative, non-redundant queries per iteration, enabling concurrent generation of informative datasets and reducing the number of machine-learning retraining cycles. A central component of this method is a cosine-similarity-based metric that complements the uncertainty criterion based on committee variance by promoting within-batch diversity. The query selection is guided by committee variance and a diversity-promoting criterion. The approach is benchmarked for efficient stress-space sampling in data-driven constitutive modeling. In this setting, a committee of support vector classifiers approximates the so-called yield surface, which is a manifold dividing the six-dimensional stress space into an elastic and plastic domain. We demonstrate that the method handles different batch sizes robustly, maintains high within batch diversity, and rapidly reduces committee uncertainty. The resulting machine learning yield surfaces achieve predictive accuracy comparable to sequential active learning, while requiring substantially fewer retraining cycles. This makes the proposed approach an efficient strategy for stress space sampling in data driven constitutive modeling and for reducing time to solution via concurrent data collection in each iteration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多样性感知的批量查询委员会主动学习策略，用于高效生成高维本构模型数据集。该方法通过余弦相似度度量确保批量内样本多样性，结合委员会方差不确定性准则，在数据驱动本构建模中实现高效应力空间采样，显著减少模型重训练次数。
AI.motivation: 本构模型中应力、应变及内变量导致高维特征空间，传统暴力采样方法受维数灾难困扰，亟需高效生成信息量最大的数据集的方法。
AI.method: 提出多样性感知的批量模式查询委员会主动学习策略：1) 采用委员会方差作为不确定性准则；2) 引入基于余弦相似度的多样性度量，确保批量内样本非冗余；3) 支持并行数据采集，每轮选取多个信息量高且多样化的查询样本。
AI.result: 该方法对不同批量大小鲁棒性强，保持高批量内多样性，快速降低委员会不确定性。生成的屈服面预测精度与序列主动学习相当，但大幅减少了重训练周期。
AI.conclusion: 该主动学习策略是数据驱动本构模型中应力空间采样的高效方法，通过并行数据收集显著缩短求解时间，具有实用价值。

title: Magnetic phases in the $J_{1}$-$J_{2}$ antiferromagnetic XY model on the honeycomb lattice
summary: We study ground-state properties and phase diagram of the $J_{1}$-$J_{2}$ antiferromagnetic XY model on the honeycomb lattice by means of the developed corner transfer matrix renormalization group algorithm with the two-site unit cell and the infinite spiral projected entangled pair states ansatz. We identify the main phases: Néel, Ising, collinear, and incommensurate spiral phases, as well as the transitions between them, as functions of the ratio $J_{2}/J_{1}$. In the regime of competing types of ordering, we show that the energies of the dimerized states are systematically higher than the energies in the collinear phase. This collinear phase transforms to the incommensurate spiral phase through the second-order phase transition upon a further increase of $J_2/J_1$.

AI.tldr: 本文运用CTMRG和iPEPS方法研究了蜂巢晶格上J1-J2反铁磁XY模型的基态性质与相图，确定了Néel、Ising、collinear和incommensurate spiral等主要相以及它们之间的转变。
AI.motivation: 蜂巢晶格上的J1-J2反铁磁XY模型存在几何阻挫导致的竞争序，此前对该模型的系统相图研究尚不充分，亟需用高精度数值方法进行刻画。
AI.method: 发展了双位点单胞的角转移矩阵重整化群（CTMRG）算法，并结合无限螺旋投影纠缠对态（iPEPS）方法进行数值计算。
AI.result: 识别出Néel、Ising、collinear和incommensurate spiral四个主要相；在竞争序区域，二聚化态能量始终高于collinear相；随着J2/J1增大，collinear相通过二级相变转变为incommensurate spiral相。
AI.conclusion: 明确了该模型在不同J2/J1比值下的相图结构，揭示了collinear相到螺旋相的二级相变机制，为理解蜂巢晶格上阻挫系统的基态行为提供了数值依据。

title: First-passage processes in a deterministic one-dimensional cellular automaton model of traffic flow
summary: We present analytical results for first-passage processes in a deterministic one-dimensional cellular automaton (CA) model of traffic flow. Starting at time $t=0$ from a random initial state with car density p, at every time step $t\ge 1$ each car moves one step to the right if the cell on its right is empty, and is stopped if it is occupied by another car. The model, which coincides with CA rule 184 in Wolfram's numbering scheme, exhibits a continuous dynamical phase transition at $p=1/2$, between a low-density free-flowing phase and a high-density congested phase. Using the framework of first-passage processes, we derive a closed-form expression for the distribution $P(T_{FS}=t)$ of first-stopping (FS) times, which is the probability that a randomly selected car will be stopped for the first time at time $t$. We also obtain a closed-form expression for the stopping probability $P_S(t)$, which is the probability that a randomly selected car will be stopped at time $t$. In the low-density phase of $0<p<1/2$, the probability $P_S(t)$ yields a closed-form expression for the distribution $P(T_{LS}=t)$ of last-stopping (LS) times, which is the probability that a randomly selected car will be stopped for the last time at time $t$, beyond which it will move freely indefinitely. In this regime, we analyze the relation between the LS time and the number of stopping events $N_S$ which take place up to that time. We present closed-form expressions for the joint distribution $P(T_{LS}=t,N_S=n)$, for the two conditional distributions that emanate from it and for the marginal distribution $P(N_S=n)$. These results provide insight on the time scales of congestion and relaxation in deterministic traffic flow from the point of view of individual cars. In a broader context, they provide insight on complex relaxation processes that involve many interacting particles, such as deterministic surface growth.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对确定性一维元胞自动机（CA规则184）交通流模型的解析研究，推导了首次停车时间分布、停车概率、最后一次停车时间分布及其与停车事件数量的联合分布等封闭表达式，揭示了低密度自由流和高密度拥堵相之间的连续动力学相变，为理解确定性交通流中个体车辆的拥堵与松弛时间尺度提供了理论洞见。
AI.motivation: 理解确定性交通流中个体车辆首次和最后一次停止的时间分布，揭示拥堵与松弛过程的微观时间尺度。作者希望从单个车辆视角，而非宏观平均量，来刻画交通流的动力学行为。
AI.method: 采用首次通过过程（first-passage processes）分析框架，对CA规则184（确定性交通流模型）进行解析推导。从随机初始构型出发，通过数学推导得到首次停车时间（T_FS）、停车概率（P_S(t)）、最后一次停车时间（T_LS）以及T_LS与停车事件数N_S的联合分布等封闭表达式。
AI.result: 给出了首次停车时间分布P(T_FS=t)的封闭表达式；给出了停车概率P_S(t)的封闭表达式；在低密度相（0<p<1/2）下，给出了最后一次停车时间分布P(T_LS=t)的封闭表达式；给出了联合分布P(T_LS=t, N_S=n)及其衍生条件分布和边缘分布P(N_S=n)的封闭表达式。
AI.conclusion: 这些解析结果从单个车辆视角揭示了确定性交通流中拥堵与松弛的时间尺度，为理解包含多粒子相互作用的复杂松弛过程（如确定性表面生长）提供了理论参考。

title: Frequency-dependent stress response under thermal cycle: A thermal-crystal plasticity and dynamic mode decomposition study
comment: Accepted for publication in International Journal of Plasticity
summary: Thermal cycle environments involving repeated temperature changes are common conditions observed in modern engineering processes. Under such conditions, materials undergo repeated thermal expansion and contraction, forming complex thermal stress fields. Thermal-crystal plasticity simulations that account for stress fields and thermal conduction at the polycrystalline microstructure scale are an effective method for numerically reproducing thermal cycle environments. However, the influence of thermal cycle frequency on the temporal behavior of the stress field and plastic response has not yet been fully understood, partly because a systematic analysis method capable of simultaneously capturing spatial heterogeneity and temporal evolution remains limited. In this study, we predicted the thermal stress field generated under different thermal cycle frequencies using thermal-crystal plasticity simulations and investigated the effect of frequency on the spatiotemporal structure of the stress response. The present framework illustrates that the resulting thermal-mechanical response can be represented as a superposition of multiple effective temporal components, reflecting the increased complexity of the system behavior. By employing dynamic mode decomposition (DMD) as a diagnostic and post-processing technique, we demonstrate that the spatiotemporal structure of the stress field under thermal cycle conditions can be systematically extracted and compactly represented. This approach enables a quantitative characterization of frequency-dependent changes in the thermal stress response beyond conventional averaging or snapshot-based analyses. The results highlight the utility of DMD as a framework for organizing complex simulation data and for interpreting the temporal structure of plastic response under cyclic thermal loading.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用热-晶体塑性模拟预测不同热循环频率下的热应力场，并采用动态模态分解（DMD）系统提取和表征应力场的时空结构，揭示了频率对应力响应时空行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 热循环频率对应力场和塑性响应的时间行为影响尚未被充分理解，部分原因是缺乏能够同时捕捉空间异质性和时间演变的系统分析方法。
AI.method: 采用热-晶体塑性模拟预测不同频率下的热应力场，并利用动态模态分解（DMD）作为诊断和后处理技术，提取和紧凑表示应力场的时空结构。
AI.result: 热-机械响应可表示为多个有效时间分量的叠加，DMD能够系统提取时空结构，实现超越传统平均或快照分析的定量表征。
AI.conclusion: DMD可作为组织复杂模拟数据和解释循环热加载下塑性响应时间结构的有效框架。

title: Nonlinear Stabilization of Non-Adiabatic Magnonic Dynamics
summary: We propose a nonlinear magnonic platform for bounded non-adiabatic parametric excitation in nanoscale ferrite structures. The approach is based on the η-algorithm, where the non-adiabaticity parameter quantifies the strength of the parametric drive, while the nonlinear frequency regulator U represents the anharmonic spectral detuning of the medium. Using Co-doped yttrium iron garnet (YIG:Co) as a representative material system, we analyze how nonlinear detuning suppresses uncontrolled parametric growth and drives the system toward a dynamically localized low-occupancy magnonic state. Numerical verification in truncated Fock bases shows that a finite regulator U can suppress leakage into higher-order modes and preserve bounded dynamics under non-adiabatic excitation. The experimentally reported absorbed energy density for ultrafast switching in YIG:Co corresponds to an estimated switching energy of approximately 22 aJ for a 20x20x10 nm3 cell, providing a physically relevant scale for low-energy resonant state formation. We further discuss the role of magnetic damping, exchange-gap confinement, and phonon transparency in maintaining coherent magnonic dynamics over multiple operation cycles. These results suggest that nonlinear self-limited non-adiabatic dynamics in ferrite nanostructures may provide a physical basis for low-energy wave-based information processing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于η算法的非线性磁振子平台，在纳米铁氧体结构中实现有界非绝热参量激发，通过非线性频率调节器U抑制参量增长，驱动系统进入动态局域的低占据磁振子态，为低能耗波基信息处理提供物理基础。
AI.motivation: 现有参量激发方法在纳米尺度下难以控制能量增长，导致动力学失稳；亟需一种能实现有界、低能耗的磁振子激发机制，用于未来低功耗波基信息处理。
AI.method: 采用η算法，用非绝热参数量化驱动强度、非线性频率调节器U表征非简谐谱失谐；以Co掺杂钇铁石榴石（YIG:Co）为材料体系，在截断Fock基下进行数值验证。
AI.result: 有限调节器U能抑制高阶模泄漏，保持非绝热激发下的有界动力学；YIG:Co中20×20×10 nm³单元的超快开关吸收能量密度对应约22 aJ的开关能量。
AI.conclusion: 非线性自限幅非绝热动力学为铁氧体纳米结构中低能耗波基信息处理提供了物理基础，磁性阻尼、交换隙约束和声子透明性对维持相干磁振子动力学至关重要。

title: Nearly perfect Fermi surface nesting in hole-doped La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ enables bulk superconductivity without pressure or strain
summary: The discovery of high-temperature superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates has drawn great attention. However, unlike cuprates and iron-based superconductors, Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates exhibit superconductivity either under high pressure in bulk samples or under compressive strain in thin films. Genuine bulk superconductivity under ambient pressure has remained elusive in these materials, precluding key measurements such as specific heat and superfluid density. In this work, we combine density-functional-theory, dynamical-mean-field-theory, and random-phase-approximation to solve the superconducting gap equation for bulk hole-doped bilayer nickelate La$_{3-x}$Sr$_x$Ni$_2$O$_7$ at ambient pressure. We find that hole doping induces a Ni-$d_{3z^2-r^2}$-derived $γ$ pocket on the Fermi surface, and serves as a tuning parameter for both its size and \textit{shape}. As $x$ approaches 0.4, the $γ$ pocket evolves from circular to diamond-shaped and expands to span half of the Brillouin zone, resulting in nearly perfect Fermi surface nesting with the optimal nesting vector $\textbf{Q} = (π, π)$. This, in turn, strongly enhances antiferromagnetic spin fluctuations and substantially increases the leading superconducting eigenvalue to a level at which superconductivity becomes experimentally observable. Our work provides both a robust mechanism and an experimentally feasible route to inducing the long-sought bulk superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ without pressure or strain.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论计算（DFT+DMFT+RPA）发现，在环境压力下对双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇进行空穴掺杂可以诱导出Ni-d₃z²-r²衍生的γ-pocket，当掺杂量x接近0.4时，该费米口袋从圆形演变为菱形并扩展至半个布里渊区，形成近乎完美的费米面嵌套，从而极大增强反铁磁自旋涨落，使超导临界温度达到实验可观测的水平，为在无需压力或应变条件下实现块体超导提供了可行途径。
AI.motivation: 尽管Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐中发现高温超导引起了广泛关注，但与铜氧化物和铁基超导体不同，这些材料要么需要在高压下（块材）要么需要在压缩应变下（薄膜）才能表现超导性，环境压力下的块体超导一直未能实现，这阻碍了比热、超流密度等关键测量。本文旨在从理论上寻找在环境压力下实现块体超导的机制和可行实验路线。
AI.method: 结合密度泛函理论（DFT）、动力学平均场理论（DMFT）和随机相位近似（RPA）求解环境压力下空穴掺杂双层镍酸盐La₃₋ₓSrₓNi₂O₇的超导能隙方程。
AI.result: 空穴掺杂诱导出Ni-d₃z²-r²衍生的γ费米口袋，该口袋的大小和形状可随掺杂量调控。当x接近0.4时，γ-pocket从圆形演变为菱形，扩展至半个布里渊区，产生以Q=(π,π)为最优波矢的近乎完美费米面嵌套，从而强烈增强反铁磁自旋涨落，使主导超导本征值提升至实验可观测水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文不仅提供了环境压力下La₃Ni₂O₇中块体超导的鲁棒机制，还提出了无需压力或应变的、实验上可行的诱导超导路径。

title: Spin-Adapted TDDFT
summary: Linear-response TDDFT is widely used for excited states but suffers from spin contamination in spin-conserving and spin-flip channels. We develop a spin-adapted RPA by using tensor equation-of-motion and applying the Wigner-Eckart theorem with tensor decoupling. Casting the RPA Fock matrix and kernels as energy derivatives gives a TDDFT extension. To restore spin-component degeneracy, we use hybrids combining HF exchange with spin-unpolarized pure XC parts. Benchmarks, Cr$_2$ dissociation, and phenol O-H conical intersections demonstrate the method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自旋适配的RPA方法，通过张量运动方程和Wigner-Eckart定理解决TDDFT中的自旋污染问题，并用杂化泛函恢复自旋分量简并性，在Cr₂解离和苯酚O-H锥形交叉等体系中验证了效果。
AI.motivation: 线性响应TDDFT在自旋守恒和自旋翻转通道中存在自旋污染问题，影响激发态计算的准确性。
AI.method: 利用张量运动方程和Wigner-Eckart定理进行张量解耦，发展自旋适配的RPA方法；将RPA Fock矩阵和核作为能量导数推广到TDDFT；使用结合HF交换与自旋非极化纯XC部分的杂化泛函恢复自旋分量简并性。
AI.result: 在Cr₂解离和苯酚O-H锥形交叉等基准测试中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了TDDFT的自旋污染问题，并恢复了自旋分量简并性，适用于强关联体系和非绝热动力学研究。

title: Deconfined Boundary Phase Transition of a Quantum Critical Heisenberg Model
summary: We investigate the boundary phases of a (2+1)-dimensional quantum critical Heisenberg model with a dangling spin chain. By introducing a multispin $Q$-term along the boundary, we drive a continuous boundary transition from an antiferromagnetic (AF) order to a valence-bond solid (VBS) order. Using large-scale quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we locate the critical point at $Q_{c}=0.310(11)$, and obtain the critical exponents at $Q_{c}$, including $y_{s}=0.81(4)$ and the scaling dimensions of AF and VBS order parameters $Δ_{s}=0.660(15)$ and $Δ_{v}=0.204(14)$. The weak long-range AF order for $Q<Q_{c}$ is stabilized by quasi-long-range effective interactions mediated by the critical bulk state, while the VBS phase restores the ordinary critical behavior. Our findings highlight the synergy between topological terms and quasi-long-range interactions in low-dimensional quantum many-body systems.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文研究了(2+1)维量子临界海森堡模型在悬挂自旋链边界上的边界相变。通过在边界引入多自旋Q项，驱动了从反铁磁(AF)到价键固体(VBS)的连续边界相变，并利用大规模量子蒙特卡洛模拟获得了临界点及临界指数。
AI.motivation: 探索低维量子多体系统中拓扑项与准长程相互作用的协同效应，理解边界相变的物理机制。
AI.method: 在(2+1)维量子临界海森堡模型的边界引入多自旋Q项，利用大规模量子蒙特卡洛模拟进行研究。
AI.result: 临界点Q_c=0.310(11)；临界指数y_s=0.81(4)；AF和VBS序参量的标度维度Δ_s=0.660(15)和Δ_v=0.204(14)。
AI.conclusion: 弱长程反铁磁序由临界体态介导的准长程有效相互作用稳定，而VBS相恢复了普通的临界行为，突出了拓扑项与准长程相互作用的协同效应。

title: Work to insert a particle into an active fluid
summary: The chemical potential is defined as the work to quasi-statically add a particle to an equilibrium system. Inspired by this definition, we investigate how the work to add a particle to an active fluid depends on the activity, density, and insertion protocol. We find that the average work is protocol dependent and decreases with activity. Moreover, the work fluctuations retain asymmetric non-Gaussian tails even for slow particle insertions. We then compare the average particle-insertion work to the steady-state densities observed when two active fluids are brought into diffusive contact and observe opposing trends between density and work.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了活性流体中添加粒子所需功与活性、密度和插入协议的关系，发现平均功依赖于协议且随活性降低，功涨落保持非高斯尾部，且密度与功之间存在相反趋势。
AI.motivation: 受化学势定义的启发，探究活性流体中粒子插入功如何受活性、密度及插入协议影响，以理解活性流体的热力学行为。
AI.method: 通过模拟活性流体中不同插入协议下的粒子添加过程，测量平均功及其涨落，并比较扩散接触时的稳态密度。
AI.result: 平均功依赖于插入协议且随活性降低；功涨落即使在缓慢插入下仍具有非高斯尾部；密度与功表现出相反趋势。
AI.conclusion: 活性流体的粒子插入功与平衡体系显著不同，活性影响热力学量，需重新审视活性系统的化学势概念。

title: Cryogenically Enhanced Laser-Induced Amorphous Phase Transitions in Crystalline Silicon
summary: Amorphization of silicon is crucial to applications in photonics, microelectronics and solar cell technologies. Ultrafast lasers have been used to generate amorphous silicon from crystalline silicon using rapid nonthermal melting and solidification in room temperature. As material temperature can affect cooling rates significantly, adding temperature control in ultrafast laser modification of silicon may allow a new degree of freedom in ultrafast laser modification. In this work, we investigate the role of cryogenic temperature in governing ultrafast damage pathways via single-shot femtosecond laser irradiation of silicon from room temperature down to 24K at 1030nm. Across this temperature range, we observe a pronounced enhancement of amorphization at lower temperatures, revealed through optical microscopy, Raman spectroscopy, and Kelvin probe force microscopy (KPFM). Raman analysis identifies this ring as an amorphous surface layer, while complementary AFM and SEM imaging show temperature-dependent changes in surface morphology, including localized melt redistribution and refrozen material. To elucidate the physical origins of this behavior, we implement a carrier dependent two-temperature model (nTTM). The simulations reproduce the experimentally observed trends and indicate that reduced phonon population, modified absorption pathways, and altered lattice relaxation dynamics at cryogenic temperatures collectively promote amorphous freezing over recrystallization. This study represents the first detailed examination of silicon under ultrafast irradiation below the liquid-nitrogen regime and reveals temperature-governed mechanisms relevant for advanced silicon microstructuring.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次系统地探索了从室温到24K低温环境下，飞秒激光照射硅材料的非晶化过程。发现低温显著增强非晶化，并通过实验与载流子依赖双温模型（nTTM）揭示了声子减少、吸收路径改变和晶格弛豫动力学变化是促进非晶化而非再结晶的关键机制。
AI.motivation: 超快激光在室温下已能实现硅的非晶化，但材料温度对冷却速率影响显著。引入温度控制（尤其是低温）可能为超快激光改性硅提供新的自由度，而液氮温度以下的低温研究尚属空白。
AI.method: 使用单发飞秒激光（1030nm）在室温至24K范围内照射硅，结合光学显微镜、拉曼光谱、KPFM、AFM、SEM进行表征，并建立载流子依赖双温模型（nTTM）进行理论模拟。
AI.result: 低温下非晶化显著增强；拉曼确认非晶表面层；AFM/SEM显示温度依赖的表面形貌变化（熔融再分布与再凝固）；nTTM模拟与实验趋势一致。
AI.conclusion: 低温下声子种群减少、吸收路径改变、晶格弛豫动力学变化共同促进非晶冻结而非再结晶。该研究首次在液氮温度以下详细考察硅的超快辐照，揭示了温度调控机制，对先进硅微结构加工有重要意义。

title: Tunable Phonon-Driven Magnon Spin Currents in Altermagnets
summary: Altermagnets have recently attracted considerable interest due to their unique symmetry-governed spintronic properties. Here, we investigate phonon-induced magnon spin currents in a two-dimensional altermagnet. Starting from a microscopic theory of the coupled magnon-phonon system, we derive the nonequilibrium magnon distribution generated by selective phonon excitations. We show that the resulting spin currents exhibit a pronounced d-wave symmetry with respect to the phonon momentum. Moreover, the spin current along the altermagnetic directions can be completely reversed by tuning the phonon frequency. These findings establish altermagnets as promising platforms for realizing highly tunable, phonon-driven coherent terahertz magnon spin currents.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维交变磁体中由声子诱导产生的磁子自旋流，发现其呈现d波对称性，且通过调节声子频率可完全反转自旋流方向，为太赫兹磁子自旋流器件提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体因其独特的对称性驱动的自旋电子学特性而受到广泛关注，但声子与磁子耦合产生的自旋流特性尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 从磁子-声子耦合系统的微观理论出发，推导了选择性声子激发下产生的非平衡磁子分布，进而分析磁子自旋流特性。
AI.result: 声子诱导的磁子自旋流呈现显著的d波对称性（相对于声子动量），并且沿交变磁方向的的自旋流可通过调节声子频率实现完全反转。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体是实现高度可调谐、声子驱动的相干太赫兹磁子自旋流的理想平台。

title: The Ultrafast Superconducting Diode Effect
summary: Nonreciprocal transport is generally observed in superconductors in which time reversal and inversion symmetries are simultaneously broken. This effect, which may become one of the backbones for future superconducting electronics, arises because of asymmetric vortex transport in a magnetic field. However, vortex transport is also intrinsically dissipative and limited in speed. Here, we report on the discovery of ultrafast non-reciprocal transport in centrosymmetric superconductors. For NbN films biased with a quasi-DC supercurrent, picosecond current pulses with the same sign as the bias experience resistive impedance, whereas pulses of opposite polarity encounter an inductive response. Strikingly, the effect is at least three orders of magnitude faster than in conventional superconducting diodes, limited only by ultrafast current-induced depairing. We demonstrate rectification of a 100 GHz signal, with dissipation levels of a few fJ per cycle. We foresee potential for superconducting logic elements, operating at THz bit rates with aJ energy dissipation per operation.

AI.tldr: 本文在中心对称超导体NbN薄膜中发现超快非互易输运现象：皮秒电流脉冲的极性决定其呈现 resistive 或 inductive 响应，整流频率达100 GHz，能耗仅fJ量级，比传统超导二极管快三个数量级，有望实现THz比特率、aJ能耗的超导逻辑器件。
AI.motivation: 传统超导非互易输运依赖涡旋运动，但涡旋输运本质耗散且速度受限，限制了超导电子学的性能上限。因此亟需探索更快、更低耗散的非互易输运机制，以满足未来超导逻辑和高速电子学需求。
AI.method: 在中心对称超导体NbN薄膜上施加准直流超电流，注入皮秒级电流脉冲，观测不同极性脉冲的阻抗响应差异（电阻性 vs 电感性），并测量100 GHz信号的整流效果及能耗。
AI.result: 观察到皮秒脉冲的极性依赖行为：同向脉冲遇电阻阻抗，反向脉冲遇电感响应。该效应比传统超导二极管快三个数量级，仅受电流诱导的超导解对机制限制；成功实现100 GHz信号整流，每周期能耗仅数fJ。
AI.conclusion: 该工作开辟了中心对称超导体中超快非互易输运的新方向，展示了THz比特率和aJ能耗的超导逻辑器件的潜力，为超导电子学提供了全新的物理基础和器件范式。

title: Prebiotic magnetite enables chirality-magnetic surface feedback
summary: The emergence of biomolecular homochirality requires both an initial symmetry-breaking event and a mechanism to amplify and preserve a chiral imbalance. Magnetic minerals have been shown to function as chiral agents through the chiral-induced spin selectivity (CISS) effect and may have enabled homochirality on early Earth, yet the magnetic properties of magnetite formed under realistic prebiotic conditions remain unexplored. Here we show that magnetite synthesized through two geochemically plausible pathways - UV-driven photo-oxidation and nitrite-mediated oxidation of Fe(II) - produces particles dominated by single-vortex and multi-vortex magnetic domain states. Magnetic measurements and electron microscopy confirm that these populations differ markedly from the nano-fabricated thin-film substrates conventionally used in previous CISS experiments. Using 3D micromagnetic simulations, we demonstrate that single-domain and vortex-state grains undergo irreversible, exchange-driven re-magnetization when interacting with spin-polarized homochiral compounds. This magnetic irreversibility provides a robust mechanism for storing and reinforcing weak chiral bias, suggesting that prebiotic magnetite could have contributed to the emergence and stabilization of persistent chiral bias on the early Earth.

AI.tldr: 本文发现通过两种前生命地球化学路径合成的磁铁矿颗粒以单涡旋和多涡旋磁畴态为主，这些颗粒在与自旋极化手性化合物相互作用时会发生不可逆的交换驱动再磁化，从而为早期地球手性失衡的放大和稳定提供了一种鲁棒机制。
AI.motivation: 生物分子同手性的起源需要对称性破缺事件和手性失衡的放大机制。此前研究表明磁性矿物可通过手性诱导自旋选择性（CISS）效应充当手性试剂，但前生命条件下形成的磁铁矿的磁性特性尚未被探索。
AI.method: 通过两种地球化学路径（紫外驱动光氧化和亚硝酸盐介导的Fe(II)氧化）合成磁铁矿；利用磁性测量和电子显微镜表征颗粒特性；采用3D微磁模拟研究颗粒与自旋极化手性化合物相互作用的磁化行为。
AI.result: 合成的磁铁矿以单涡旋和多涡旋磁畴态为主，与传统CISS实验使用的纳米薄膜基底显著不同；模拟显示单畴和涡旋态颗粒与自旋极化手性化合物发生不可逆交换驱动再磁化。
AI.conclusion: 这种磁性不可逆性为存储和增强微弱手性偏置提供了鲁棒机制，提示前生命磁铁矿可能促进了早期地球持久手性偏置的出现和稳定。

title: Predicting Organic Solar Cell Performance and Stability from Fast, Morphology-aware Current-Voltage Modeling
summary: Understanding the relationship between morphology and performance in organic solar cells is essential for developing devices that are both high performing and resilient to aging. This work introduces a unique method capable of calculating the current-voltage (JV) curve of complex heterojunction morphologies containing up to five phases (donor amorphous, donor crystalline, acceptor amorphous, acceptor crystalline, mixed amorphous) with a very low computation time using morphology-aware descriptors of light absorption, exciton dissociation, non-geminate recombination and free charge carrier mobilities. The method is validated against Monte Carlo and 3D drift-diffusion simulations and applied to P3HT:PCBM and PM6:Y6 systems, shedding light on the physical compromises encountered to optimize device performance and lifetime. Finally, we show that the morphology-performance relationship is dependent on the materials system studied.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种能够快速计算包含最多五相（给体非晶、给体结晶、受体非晶、受体结晶、混合非晶）的复杂异质结形态的电流-电压（JV）曲线的方法，利用形态感知描述符来表征光吸收、激子解离、非孪生复合和自由电荷载流子迁移率。该方法经蒙特卡洛和三维漂移扩散模拟验证，并应用于P3HT:PCBM和PM6:Y6体系，揭示了优化器件性能和寿命所涉及的物理权衡。
AI.motivation: 理解有机太阳能电池中形态与性能之间的关系，对于开发既高性能又抗老化的器件至关重要。
AI.method: 提出了一种独特方法，利用形态感知描述符（光吸收、激子解离、非孪生复合、自由电荷载流子迁移率），以极低计算时间计算包含最多五相的复杂异质结形态的JV曲线。
AI.result: 该方法通过蒙特卡洛和三维漂移扩散模拟验证，成功应用于P3HT:PCBM和PM6:Y6体系，揭示了器件的物理权衡，并发现形态-性能关系依赖于具体的材料体系。
AI.conclusion: 形态与性能的关系受材料体系影响，该快速计算方法能有效揭示优化器件性能与寿命之间的物理权衡。

title: Hidden weak-pairing superconductivity of non-interacting anyons obeying $\frac{1}{3}$ statistics
summary: We show that a non-interacting gas of charge-$e/3$ anyons with exchange statistics $θ=-π/3$ can superconduct through a hidden weak-pairing mechanism. Such an anyon gas arises naturally in doped fractional Chern insulators at filling $1/3$ or $2/3$, where projective lattice translations enforce three degenerate anyon pockets. Exploiting this three-pocket structure, we develop a flux-attachment construction in which the average statistical flux vanishes, thereby mapping the problem to three species of composite fermions (CFs) in zero effective magnetic field. We show that the anyon statistics itself, encoded in statistical gauge field fluctuations, supplies the pairing glue and drives the CFs into a $p-\mathrm{i}p$ paired state, which corresponds to a $f-\mathrm{i}f$ physical superconductor. The CF strong-pairing phase is adiabatically connected to Laughlin's picture of anyon superconductivity, where charge-$e/3$ anyons bind into charge-$2e/3$ molecules, which then lead to superconductivity. By contrast, the more natural weak-pairing phase of CFs realizes a distinct superconducting phase - its edge is characterized by a chiral central charge $c_-=-1/2$, in contrast to the prediction of integer $c_-$ for the anyon superconductor based on Laughlin's picture, thereby resolving the discrepancy between previous theories and recent numerical results. Our theory provides a natural framework for understanding superconductivity near fractional Chern insulators, as observed in recent experiments. Finally, we discuss extensions of our theory that predict new chiral superconductors adjacent to FCIs at other fillings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分数陈绝缘体附近电荷-e/3任意子的超导机制，通过隐式弱配对机制实现超导，边缘态手征中心荷c_-=-1/2，解决了理论与数值结果的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 揭示分数陈绝缘体中任意子气体的超导机制，并解决此前理论与数值结果在边缘态手征中心荷上的不一致。
AI.method: 利用三分量口袋结构，通过通量附着构造将问题映射为零有效磁场下的三种复合费米子，利用统计规范场涨落提供配对胶水，驱动复合费米子进入p-ip配对态。
AI.result: 复合费米子的弱配对相实现了手征中心荷c_-=-1/2的超导相，而非Laughlin图像中整数c_-的预测，解决了理论与数值的差异。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为理解分数陈绝缘体附近的超导现象提供了自然框架，并可推广预测其他填充下的新手征超导体。

title: The Thermodynamic Costs of Simple Linear Regression
summary: The construction of models from data is a significant contributor to the energetic costs of computation. Because of this, understanding how foundational thermodynamic bounds apply to modeling algorithms will be increasingly important. Here, we study the thermodynamic costs of a basic and fundamental modeling algorithm: simple linear regression. Following Landauer, we approximate the thermodynamic lower bound on irreversibly performing both exact linear regression and linear regression via stochastic gradient descent as implemented on floating-point numbers. From this, we derive energycost aware scaling laws for the optimal dataset size for training a linear regression model given a generalization error dependent demand for inference. Additionally, we discuss a method to lower bound the entropy production from the mismatch cost for algorithms with continuous input variables.

AI.tldr: 本文研究简单线性回归算法在计算中的热力学成本，基于Landauer原理推导了精确回归和随机梯度下降回归的热力学下界，并提出了能量成本感知的缩放定律来优化数据集大小，同时讨论了连续变量算法的熵产生下界方法。
AI.motivation: 从数据构建模型是计算能量消耗的重要来源，理解基础热力学界限如何应用于建模算法变得越来越重要，因此需要研究线性回归这类基本建模算法的热力学成本。
AI.method: 遵循Landauer原理，近似计算了浮点数实现下精确线性回归和随机梯度下降线性回归的热力学下界；推导了能量成本感知的缩放定律；讨论了连续输入变量算法中失配成本导致的熵产生下界方法。
AI.result: 得到了给定泛化误差需求下训练线性回归模型的最优数据集大小的能量成本感知缩放定律。
AI.conclusion: 为理解建模算法的热力学成本提供了理论基础，揭示了能量效率与数据集大小、泛化误差之间的权衡关系。

title: Charge Symmetry Beyond Wyckoff Equivalence
summary: Crystallographic symmetry is usually taken as a guide to electronic equivalence in crystals: atoms on the same Wyckoff position are expected to have the same charge, whereas atoms on different Wyckoff positions are expected to be electronically distinct. Here we show that both expectations can fail in oppo-site ways: crystallographically equivalent sites can become charge-inequivalent under compression, whereas crystallographically inequivalent sites can remain charge-equivalent at low pressure because of an emergent hidden symmetry. We develop a minimal Landau theory of pressure-induced charge transfer, in which compression enhances the intersite Coulomb energy gained by charge redistribution until it overcomes the onsite charging cost and destabilizes the charge-equivalent state. In BCC Na, all sites are charge-equivalent at low pressure, but compression drives charge transfer between neighboring sites, pro-ducing an electronically symmetry-broken CsCl-type state on an unchanged BCC ionic framework. In hP4 Na, the opposite anomaly occurs: two Na sites occupy distinct Wyckoff positions, yet remain charge-equivalent at low pressure because of an emergent gauge equivalence in the low-energy manifold, giving rise to near-Fermi doublets that appear accidental in conventional space-group analysis. Upon compres-sion, pressure-induced charge transfer breaks this hidden equivalence, splits the near-Fermi doublets, and drives a metal-insulator transition. These two complementary cases establish pressure-induced charge transfer as a mechanism by which electronic equivalence can either fall below or rise above what Wyckoff positions alone would suggest, showing that lattice symmetry constrains but does not uniquely determine the equivalence structure of the electronic state.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示压力下晶体的电子等价性可能偏离Wyckoff位置对称性的预期：原本等价的位点可变得不等价，原本不等价的位点因隐藏对称性可保持等价。通过最小Landau理论解释压力诱导的电荷转移机制，并在BCC Na和hP4 Na中验证了这两种互补现象。
AI.motivation: 挑战晶体学中"Wyckoff位置决定电子等价性"的传统认知，探索压力下电子等价性可能背离晶格对称性的机制。
AI.method: 构建最小Landau理论描述压力诱导电荷转移；以BCC Na（等价位点变不等价）和hP4 Na（不等价位点保持等价）为案例进行理论分析。
AI.result: BCC Na中压力驱动电荷转移，产生CsCl型电子对称破缺；hP4 Na中低能规范等价性使不同Wyckoff位点保持电荷等价，压力打破隐藏对称性并驱动金属-绝缘体转变。
AI.conclusion: 压力诱导电荷转移是电子等价性可低于或高于Wyckoff位点对称性预期的机制，晶格对称性约束但非唯一决定电子态的等价结构。

title: An Energy Integration Free Kubo-Bastin Formula Decomposition
summary: Kubo formulae play a central role in modern spintronics and condensed matter physics, serving as the foundational ground for studying transport responses in the linear regime. In this work, we propose a reformulation of the widely used Kubo-Bastin decompositions that eliminates the need for numerical energy integration. By performing these integrations analytically for generic periodic systems, our approach drastically reduces computational cost and simplifies the evaluation of transport coefficients.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需数值能量积分的Kubo-Bastin分解重构方法，通过解析积分大幅降低计算成本，简化了周期性系统中输运系数的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有的Kubo-Bastin分解方法在计算输运响应时需要进行数值能量积分，计算成本高且过程繁琐，需要改进效率。
AI.method: 对周期性系统进行解析能量积分，替代原有的数值积分步骤，从而重构Kubo-Bastin分解公式。
AI.result: 计算成本显著降低，输运系数的评估过程得到简化。
AI.conclusion: 该解析重构方法在保持精度的同时提升了计算效率，为自旋电子学和凝聚态物理中的输运研究提供了更高效的方案。

title: Secondary Collective Excitations in Intermediate to Strong-Coupling Superconductors
summary: Considering systematically derived energy-transfer-dependent effective electron-electron interactions leads to the appearance of secondary phase and amplitude modes in isotropic superconductors in the intermediate-to-strong-coupling regime. We study the implications of such interactions on Bravais lattices by computing the corresponding response functions using the iterated equations of motion (iEoM) approach. In the weak-coupling regime, we find the conventional, primary amplitude and phase modes at $ω=2Δ$ and $ω=0$, respectively. For intermediate coupling, the amplitude mode detaches from the quasiparticle continuum towards lower energies. Increasing the coupling further leads to additional, long-lived secondary collective excitations below the continuum. This phenomenon is largely independent of the underlying lattice and the specific Fermi level. The amplitude and phase modes couple if the system is not particle-hole symmetric. Additionally, we extend the method to compute eigenoperators, i.e., linear combinations of operators that excite each secondary mode specifically. We identify nodal structures in the coefficients for these eigenoperators reminiscent of wave functions in the Hydrogen problem.

AI.tldr: 本文研究强耦合各向同性超导体中由能量传递依赖的有效电子-电子相互作用导致的次级相模式和振幅模式，通过迭代运动方程方法计算响应函数，发现中等耦合下振幅模式从准粒子连续谱分离，强耦合下出现长寿命次级集体激发，并揭示了与氢原子波函数类似的本征算子节点结构。
AI.motivation: 系统推导能量传递依赖的有效电子-电子相互作用后，发现中间到强耦合区域各向同性超导体中会出现次级相模式和振幅模式，这促使作者研究此类相互作用在布拉维晶格上的影响。
AI.method: 使用迭代运动方程（iEoM）方法计算响应函数，并通过计算本征算子（即特定激发各次级模式的算子线性组合）来扩展该方法。
AI.result: 弱耦合时观察到常规的主振幅模式（ω=2Δ）和相位模式（ω=0）；中等耦合时振幅模式从准粒子连续谱向低能分离；强耦合时出现连续谱以下的长寿命次级集体激发。振幅和相位模式在非粒子-空穴对称系统中会耦合。本征算子的系数呈现出类似氢原子波函数的节点结构。
AI.conclusion: 次级集体激发现象在很大程度上独立于底层晶格和具体费米能级，揭示了强耦合超导体中集体激发的普适性行为。

title: Accelerated "on-the-fly" coupled-cluster path-integral molecular dynamics: Impact of nuclear quantum effects on an asymmetric proton
summary: We present an accelerated ``on-the-fly'' coupled-cluster path-integral molecular dynamics (PIMD) method for finite-temperature simulations in which electron correlation and nuclear quantum effects are treated simultaneously. The approach is based on our quantum ring-polymer contraction (qRPC) technique, in which the inexpensive Hartree-Fock potential is evaluated on the full ring-polymer, while the expensive coupled-cluster correction is evaluated on the centroid only. This qRPC decomposition is combined with a second-generation Car-Parrinello-like dynamics of the Hartree-Fock reference and a basis-consistent extrapolation of the coupled-cluster and de-excitation amplitudes. The combination of all three acceleration layers is essential for making correlated PIMD calculations feasible. We apply the method to a proton shared by water and formaldehyde. Relative to classical nuclei, nuclear quantum effects broaden covalent X--H bond-length distributions, reduce the bias of the shared proton toward formaldehyde, and shift the mean proton-transfer coordinate from 0.206 to 0.135A. The probability of finding the proton closer to formaldehyde decreases from 81.7$\%$ to 61.1$\%$. The corresponding nuclear magnetic shielding tensors show that electron correlation and nuclear quantum effects are of comparable magnitude and can act in opposite directions. These results demonstrate that predictive simulations of asymmetric hydrogen bonds require a simultaneous treatment of correlated electronic structure and nuclear quantum fluctuations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种加速的“即时”耦合簇路径积分分子动力学（PIMD）方法，能够同时处理电子关联和核量子效应。该方法结合了量子环聚合物收缩（qRPC）技术、第二代类Car-Parrinello动力学以及基组一致的耦合簇振幅外推，使关联PIMD计算变得可行。应用于水-甲醛共享质子体系后发现，核量子效应使共价键长分布变宽、质子偏向甲醛的倾向减弱，且电子关联与核量子效应大小相当甚至方向相反，表明不对称氢键的预测性模拟需要同时考虑这两者。
AI.motivation: 现有的有限温度模拟方法难以同时高效处理电子关联和核量子效应，尤其是在不对称氢键等体系中，这两种效应大小相当且可能相互抵消或叠加，亟需一种能够兼顾二者的计算方法。
AI.method: 提出三重加速策略：(1) 量子环聚合物收缩（qRPC），将廉价HF势在全环聚合物上计算，昂贵CC校正仅在质心上计算；(2) 第二代类Car-Parrinello动力学处理HF参考态；(3) 基组一致的CC振幅外推。
AI.result: 应用于水-甲醛共享质子体系：核量子效应使X-H键长分布变宽，质子偏向甲醛的偏移量从0.206Å降至0.135Å，质子靠近甲醛的概率从81.7%降至61.1%。核磁屏蔽张量显示电子关联与核量子效应大小相当且方向可能相反。
AI.conclusion: 不对称氢键的预测性模拟需要同时处理关联电子结构和核量子涨落，因为二者大小相当且可能相互竞争。

title: Building a Regional Data-Centric Materials Science Ecosystem for Processing-Rich Materials Innovation in the Great Plains
summary: Data-centric materials science is changing how materials are discovered, optimized, manufactured, and qualified, yet many deployment-limiting materials problems still depend on experimental, processing-rich, device-level, and field-relevant data that are difficult to capture in conventional materials databases. This perspective argues that the Great Plains and adjacent interior research corridor can make a distinctive national contribution by organizing distributed experimental assets into a trusted regional materials-data ecosystem. The proposed model emphasizes FAIR metadata, provenance, persistent sample identifiers, uncertainty-aware modeling, semi-closed-loop workflows, stackable workforce training, and tiered governance for academic, public, controlled-access, and industry-protected data. We identify five coupled barriers -- fragmented data, weak algorithm--laboratory translation, uneven access to cyberinfrastructure and technical staff, workforce gaps at the materials--data interface, and insufficient incentives for sharing and reuse -- and propose a staged roadmap for addressing them. A high-purity germanium pilot illustrates how regional strengths can be converted into reusable datasets, benchmark models, trained personnel, and decision-improving workflows. The broader message is that regional leadership in data-centric materials science will depend less on geographic concentration than on trustworthy data practices, interoperable infrastructure, cross-trained people, and application-driven materials challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出美国大平原及邻近内陆研究走廊应通过构建区域材料数据生态系统，整合分布式实验资源，以解决数据碎片化、算法-实验室转化弱、基础设施不均、人才缺口和共享激励不足等五大障碍，并通过高纯锗试点案例展示可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统材料数据库难以捕获实验性、工艺密集、器件级和现场相关的数据，而这些数据正是限制材料部署的关键问题。作者认为区域化的数据生态系统能够弥补这一缺口。
AI.method: 提出一个包含FAIR元数据、溯源追踪、持久样本标识符、不确定性感知建模、半闭环工作流、可堆叠人才培训和分级数据治理（学术/公共/受控/工业保护）的综合模型，并设计分阶段路线图应对五大耦合障碍。
AI.result: 通过高纯锗（HPGe）试点展示了区域优势如何转化为可复用数据集、基准模型、培训人才和决策优化工作流。
AI.conclusion: 区域在数据驱动材料科学中的领导力并不取决于地理集中度，而取决于可信数据实践、可互操作基础设施、跨学科人才和应用驱动的研究挑战。

title: The analysis of heat capacity of MnGe metallic helimagnet
summary: Zero-field heat capacity of metallic helimagnet MnGe was analyzed based on the results of resistivity decomposition published previously by our group for the same crystal. Current procedure allowed identifying along with ($i$) electronic ($\tildeγ$ $\approx$ 7 mJ/mol$\cdot$K$^2$) and ($ii$) phononic ($Θ_D$ $\approx$ 350 K) components ($iii$) the additional term, caused by the presence of spin fluctuations (SFs). The last contribution was found to exist in a wide range of temperatures in both paramagnetic (PM) and magnetically ordered states. However, its amplitude appears to be significantly lower in comparison with phononic component. The obtained value of spin fluctuation temperature $θ_{sf}$(MnGe) $\approx$ 330 K correlates well with previous estimations, as well as with results of various experiments, which predict the existence of SFs in MnGe at least up to 250 $-$ 300 K.

AI.tldr: 该研究基于电阻率分解结果，分析了金属螺旋磁体MnGe的零场热容，成功分离出电子、声子和自旋涨落三个贡献，发现自旋涨落存在于较宽温区但幅度低于声子分量，其特征温度约330K与先前研究吻合。
AI.motivation: 通过热容分析识别MnGe中自旋涨落对热容的贡献，并定量评估其与电子、声子分量的相对大小。
AI.method: 利用前期电阻率分解结果，对MnGe单晶的零场热容数据进行多分量拟合，分离出电子项（$\tildeγ$）、声子项（德拜温度$Θ_D$）和自旋涨落项。
AI.result: 电子项$\tildeγ \approx 7$ mJ/mol·K²，声子德拜温度$Θ_D \approx 350$ K，自旋涨落特征温度$θ_{sf} \approx 330$ K。自旋涨落贡献在顺磁和磁有序态均存在，但幅度显著低于声子分量。
AI.conclusion: 自旋涨落在MnGe中广泛存在于较宽温区，其特征温度约330K，与多种实验结果一致，证实了自旋涨落在该材料中的重要性。

title: Finite-temperature crossover from coherent magnons to energy superdiffusion in the PXP model
summary: The PXP chain was recently shown to exhibit superdiffusive energy transport with Kardar-Parisi-Zhang-like scaling, $z\approx3/2$, joining a growing number of spin chains with this exponent. An understanding of how this anomalous hydrodynamics emerges from microscopics is, however, still lacking. In this work, we show that finite-temperature energy transport in this model provides a window into the emergence of superdiffusion. At finite temperature, the energy autocorrelation function exhibits a crossover from short-time coherent dynamics to long-time hydrodynamics. The short-time behavior is dominated by a single magnon band and can be understood analytically. In momentum space, this regime is characterized by spectral weight near $q=π$. The damping time $τ$, which separates the short-time magnon-dominated behavior from the late-time hydrodynamics, grows rapidly upon cooling, consistent with an activated form $τ(β)\sim βe^{Δβ}$ with a gap scale set by the magnon band. At longer times, the spectral weight transfers to $q=0$ and the running decay exponent drifts toward the superdiffusive value $z=3/2$. Finite-temperature energy transport therefore provides a bridge between microscopic magnon physics and late-time superdiffusion in the PXP model.

AI.tldr: PXP链在有限温度下的能量输运表现出从短时磁子主导的相干动力学到长时超扩散（z≈3/2）的交叉行为，阻尼时间随冷却呈激活形式增长，为理解超扩散的微观起源提供了桥梁。
AI.motivation: PXP链已被发现具有类似Kardar-Parisi-Zhang的超扩散能量输运（z≈3/2），但这种反常流体动力学如何从微观机制中涌现尚不清楚，本文旨在填补这一理解空白。
AI.method: 通过分析PXP模型在有限温度下的能量自关联函数，研究其从短时相干动力学到长时流体动力学的交叉行为；在动量空间追踪谱权重从q=π向q=0的转移，并提取阻尼时间τ的温度依赖关系。
AI.result: 短时行为由单磁子带主导，可在解析上理解；阻尼时间τ随冷却呈激活形式τ(β)~βe^{Δβ}增长，能隙尺度由磁子带设定；长时谱权重转移至q=0，运行衰减指数漂移至超扩散值z=3/2。
AI.conclusion: 有限温度能量输运为PXP模型中从微观磁子物理到长时超扩散之间架起了桥梁，揭示了反常流体动力学如何从微观中涌现。

title: Polar optical scattering in ellipsoidal nanoclusters
summary: The influence of the specific geometry of three-dimensional confinement on electron- vibrational coupling in InAs/GaAs nanoclusters shaped as highly oblate ellipsoids of revolution is considered. Optical phonon relaxation processes are analyzed taking into account the law of conservation of angular momentum projection and the spatial symmetry of the dimensional confinement. The conditions for the emission of chiral optical phonons carrying orbital angular momentum along the structure's growth axis are analyzed. Intraband relaxation transitions with the emission of LO phonons with zero angular momentum, with characteristic anisotropy of the emission direction, leading to nonmonotonic size dependences for the e-ph coupling coefficient, are considered.

AI.tldr: 研究了InAs/GaAs纳米团簇（高度扁椭球状）中三维受限几何对电子-声子耦合的影响，分析了角动量守恒和空间对称性下的光学声子弛豫过程，发现了手性声子发射条件和各向异性导致的非单调尺寸依赖。
AI.motivation: 探索三维受限几何形状（尤其是扁椭球状）对电子-振动耦合的具体影响，理解角动量守恒和空间对称性在纳米结构中的角色。
AI.method: 基于角动量投影守恒和空间对称性约束，分析光学声子弛豫过程，考虑手性光学声子的发射条件及零角动量LO声子的各向异性发射。
AI.result: 发现了手性光学声子（携带轨道角动量沿生长轴）的发射条件；零角动量LO声子的发射方向具有特征各向异性，导致电子-声子耦合系数呈现非单调尺寸依赖。
AI.conclusion: 三维受限的几何形状（扁椭球）显著影响电子-声子耦合行为，各向异性和角动量选择规则导致新颖的声子弛豫特性。

title: Electronic and Magnonic Properties of $g$-Wave Altermagnetism in Intercalated Transition Metal Dichalcogenides
summary: Altermagnetism is a recently identified class of magnetic order characterized by unconventional momentum-dependent spin splitting in the absence of net magnetization, and understanding its electronic and magnetic properties is essential for revealing its fundamental physics and potential applications. In this work we investigate two intercalated transition-metal dichalcogenides, Fe$_{1/4}$NbS$_2$ and V$_{1/3}$NbS$_2$, as candidate altermagnetic materials by using effective tight-binding and spin models complemented by first-principles calculations. We show that the $g$-wave electronic spin splitting originates from bond-dependent hopping anisotropy, leading to material-dependent nodal structures. For the magnetic excitations, the emergence of chiral splitting in the magnon dispersion is controlled by single-ion anisotropy, which manifests as altermagnetic-like nodal structures when spins are oriented along an easy-axis. Conversely, this altermagnetic signature disappears when the spins are aligned in an easy-plane. Beyond linear spin-wave theory, we find that $1/S$ corrections from magnon--magnon interactions preserve the symmetry and nodal structure of the band splitting while generally reducing its magnitude, with strong antiferromagnetic exchange leading to a non-negligible renormalization of the chiral splitting. Our findings establish intercalated transition-metal dichalcogenides as promising platforms for understanding the interplay between crystal symmetry, non-relativistic spin splitting, and magnetic properties in altermagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过紧束缚模型、自旋模型和第一性原理计算，研究了插层过渡金属二硫族化物Fe₁/₄NbS₂和V₁/₃NbS₂作为交替磁性材料的性质，揭示了g波电子自旋分裂源于键依赖的跳跃各向异性，以及磁激发中手性分裂受单离子各向异性控制，并发现磁振子相互作用会重整化但保留手性分裂的对称性和节点结构。
AI.motivation: 交替磁性是一种新型磁性序，具有无净磁化下的非常规动量依赖自旋分裂，理解其电子和磁性性质对揭示其基础物理和潜在应用至关重要。
AI.method: 采用有效紧束缚模型和自旋模型，辅以第一性原理计算，研究Fe₁/₄NbS₂和V₁/₃NbS₂两种插层过渡金属二硫族化物。
AI.result: g波电子自旋分裂源于键依赖的跳跃各向异性，导致材料依赖的节点结构；磁激发中手性分裂受单离子各向异性控制，沿易轴时呈现交替磁性节点结构，易面时消失；1/S修正保留对称性和节点结构但减小分裂幅度，强反铁磁交换导致不可忽略的重整化。
AI.conclusion: 插层过渡金属二硫族化物是理解交替磁体中晶体对称性、非相对论自旋分裂和磁性性质之间相互作用的理想平台。

title: Planckian dissipation from classical hydrodynamics
summary: In this work we ask what the self-consistency of a classical hydrodynamic description imposes on a quantum system. The quantum fluctuation-dissipation theorem, when read in the time domain, acts as a blurring of the fine details of the correlation functions on a Plankian time-scale. We track this blurring along rays inside the light cone for three phenomenological hydrodynamic equations -- diffusion, telegraph and diffusive-telegraph -- and find that the interior of the cone splits into a classical region, where correlation and response satisfy the classical fluctuation-dissipation relation, and a quantum region, where they deviate sharply from it. Preserving a finite classical region as the temperature is lowered forces the effective relaxation rate to be at least Planckian, recovering bounds on diffusivity, equilibration time and shear viscosity. In this way, Planckian scaling of the diffusion constant emerges not as a quantum constraint on microscopic dynamics, but as the price a system pays to remain describable by classical hydrodynamics down to low temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本文从经典流体力学自洽性出发，证明了普朗克尺度扩散常数并非微观量子约束，而是系统为在低温下保持经典流体力学描述所需付出的代价。通过分析量子涨落-耗散定理在光锥内的模糊化过程，揭示了经典区域与量子区域的分界，并恢复了扩散率、平衡时间和剪切粘度的边界。
AI.motivation: 探究经典流体力学描述的自洽性对量子系统施加了什么约束，特别是普朗克尺度扩散常数（Planckian bound）的起源——它是量子微观动力学的固有约束，还是经典描述的自洽性要求。
AI.method: 从量子涨落-耗散定理出发，在时域中分析普朗克时间尺度上关联函数的模糊化效应。沿光锥内射线追踪三种流体力学方程（扩散方程、电报方程、扩散-电报方程）的关联函数和响应函数，划分经典区域和量子区域。
AI.result: 光锥内部被划分为经典区域（满足经典涨落-耗散关系）和量子区域（与经典偏离）。保持经典区域在低温下存在，要求有效弛豫率至少达到普朗克尺度，从而恢复了对扩散率、平衡时间和剪切粘度的已知边界。
AI.conclusion: 普朗克尺度的扩散常数不是量子微观动力学对系统的硬性约束，而是系统为了在低温下仍能用经典流体力学描述所必须付出的代价。这从经典流体力学自洽性的角度重新解释了普朗克边界的起源。

title: Evaluation of External Magnetic Flux Density in Piezo-Flexomagnetic Nanobeams Using a Hybrid 1D-2D Finite Element Framework
summary: This study numerically evaluates the external magnetic flux density generated in air by the bending of a piezo-flexomagnetic nanobeam. In several classes of non-contact sensors, the magnetic field induced in the surrounding medium is often more useful than the internal magnetic response. However, most theoretical studies on piezo-flexomagnetic nanostructures neglect the external magnetic domain. The proposed framework employs a coupled hybrid finite element formulation combining a 1D Timoshenko beam model with a 2D magnetostatic problem encompassing both the beam body and the surrounding air domain. The formulation is verified against analytical solutions of magnetically isolated piezo-flexomagnetic beams. The results demonstrate the presence of a significant external magnetic flux distribution in free-standing structures, even in the absence of piezomagnetic coupling. A systematic sensitivity analysis further identifies the material parameters most strongly influencing the external transverse magnetic flux density. These findings provide insight into the design of nanoscale non-contact magnetoelastic sensing systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值方法评估了压电-挠曲磁纳米梁弯曲时在空气中产生的外部磁通密度，并提出了一个耦合混合有限元公式，证明了即使在没有压磁耦合的情况下，自由站立结构中也存在显著的外部磁通分布。
AI.motivation: 大多数理论研究中忽略了压电-挠曲磁纳米结构的外部磁域，而在非接触传感器中，周围介质中的磁场比内部磁场更有用，因此需要开发能够预测外部磁通密度的数值框架。
AI.method: 采用耦合混合有限元公式，将一维Timoshenko梁模型与同时包含梁体和周围空气域的二维静磁问题相结合，并通过与磁性隔离的压电-挠曲磁梁的解析解进行验证。
AI.result: 自由站立结构中存在显著的外部磁通分布，即使在无压磁耦合情况下也是如此；通过敏感性分析确定了对外部横向磁通密度影响最大的材料参数。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为非接触磁弹性传感系统的纳米尺度设计提供了重要见解。

title: Twisted light generates robust many-body states for practical quantum computing
summary: Twisted light carries orbital angular momentum (OAM) and can drive excitations of confined, interacting electrons that are dark to uniform dipolar probes. Here we show how this ``beyond-Kohn's-Theorem'' optical channel can become a concrete control primitive for quantum computing. Correlation sectors in few-electron quantum dots -- characterized by the relative angular momentum quantum number -- form a tunable ladder of many-body states that are robust in the limited sense of symmetry-protected selection rules and persistent chiral spectroscopic fingerprints; full topological gap protection requires three or more electrons. A twisted-light pulse with prescribed OAM index and polarization provides fast optical write, read, and scalable addressing of these sectors via the selection rule $Δ|m|=\pm(l+σ)$. In the analytically solvable Calogero ($1/r^2$) interaction limit, both the energy spectrum and the twisted-light matrix elements are closed-form functions of the interaction strength, allowing gate parameters (Rabi frequency, qubit frequency, anharmonicity, and leakage rates) to be written down explicitly. We map these results onto a universal single-qubit gate set, propose a concrete two-qubit entangling mechanism via state-dependent Coulomb coupling between adjacent dots, and identify the dominant decoherence channel (quadrupolar charge noise). A semi-analytic $N=3$ extension using the $1/N$ expansion provides a design-level scaffold for the topological roadmap, including quasihole sector addressing. The central operational message is that twisted light enables WRITE (pulse-create a correlation sector), READ (spectroscopically diagnose correlations), and SCALE (optical addressing via spatial light modulator) in a unified photonic control layer. Throughout, screened and Coulomb interactions preserve the same qualitative chiral fingerprints established in the solvable limit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用携带轨道角动量（OAM）的扭曲光作为量子计算的新控制手段，通过激发少电子量子点中由相对角动量量子数表征的多体关联扇区，实现快速的光学写入、读取和可扩展寻址，并在可解Calogero相互作用极限下给出了完整的门参数解析形式。
AI.motivation: 标准偶极探针无法探测的"暗态"电子关联扇区，可以通过扭曲光的OAM通道实现激发与控制，从而为量子计算提供一种超越传统Kohn定理的新光学控制基元。
AI.method: 利用扭曲光（携带OAM l和极化σ）的选择定则Δ|m|=±(l+σ)驱动量子点中电子关联扇区间的跃迁；在可解的Calogero（1/r²）相互作用极限下解析求解能谱和跃迁矩阵元；映射到通用单比特门组；通过相邻量子点间的态依赖库仑耦合实现两比特纠缠；利用1/N展开处理N=3的拓扑情况。
AI.result: 推导了Rabi频率、量子比特频率、非简谐性和泄漏率等门参数的解析表达式；提出了基于扭曲光的WRITE-READ-SCALE统一光子控制层；明确了主要退相干通道为四极电荷噪声；给出了准空穴扇区寻址的拓扑路线图设计框架。
AI.conclusion: 扭曲光为量子点量子计算提供了一种全新的光学控制范式，能够在统一的控制层中实现写入、读取和可扩展寻址，且屏蔽和库仑相互作用下仍保持相同的手性光谱特征。

title: FNO-CCSDTQ(5)$_Λ$ as an economical alternative for connected quintuple excitations contributions in coupled cluster thermochemistry
comment: to be submitted, 7 pages in AIP two-column format
summary: Contributions from connected quintuple excitations in coupled cluster theory can reach the 0.5 kcal/mol range, important enough to matter in accurate computational thermochemistry, yet the very steep $\propto N^{12}$ CPU time scaling impedes routine evaluation. We show that for the differential contribution of quintuples, convergence of a frozen natural orbital (FNO) expansion with respect to the NO cutoff is rapid enough to make FNO-CCSDTQ(5)$_Λ$ with cutoffs of 0.0025 or 0.001 viable alternatives. A naive extrapolation to zero cutoff from \{0.005,0.0025\} works surprisingly well as a low-cost option. Interestingly, FNO convergence is definitely slower for second-row than for first-row compounds.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用冻结自然轨道（FNO）近似和截断外推法，将原本 $O(N^{12})$ 的五重激发贡献计算降低到实用水平，在保持 0.5 kcal/mol 精度的同时大幅节省计算成本。
AI.motivation: 耦合簇理论中连接五重激发的贡献可达 0.5 kcal/mol，对精确计算热化学很重要，但其 $O(N^{12})$ 的极高计算成本阻碍了常规应用。
AI.method: 使用冻结自然轨道（FNO）近似来加速五重激发差分贡献的计算，并评估不同 NO 截断值的收敛性，同时提出从 {0.005, 0.0025} 向零截断外推的低成本方案。
AI.result: FNO 截断值在 0.0025 或 0.001 时即可达到实用精度；简单的零截断外推法效果出奇地好；但 FNO 收敛速度在第二行化合物中明显慢于第一行化合物。
AI.conclusion: FNO-CCSDTQ(5)ₐ 方法结合截断外推是评估五重激发贡献的可行低成本方案。

title: PEPSKit.jl: A Julia package for projected entangled-pair state simulations
summary: We present PEPSKit.jl, a Julia package for simulating two-dimensional quantum many-body systems with infinite projected entangled-pair states (iPEPS). PEPSKit.jl builds on the TensorKit.jl package for tensor computations and provides high-level algorithms for iPEPS simulations that support both Abelian and non-Abelian symmetries, as well as fermionic systems. This work gives an overview of the main package features, which include support for ground-state, time-evolution, and finite-temperature simulations in systems with different physical symmetries and lattice geometries. These capabilities are illustrated through various examples and technical benchmarks.

AI.tldr: PEPSKit.jl是一个基于Julia语言、利用TensorKit.jl进行张量计算的软件包，用于模拟二维量子多体系统中的无限投影纠缠对态（iPEPS），支持阿贝尔/非阿贝尔对称性和费米子系统，并提供基态、时间演化和有限温度模拟算法。
AI.motivation: 二维量子多体系统的数值模拟在凝聚态物理中至关重要，但iPEPS方法的实现复杂，尤其是支持多种对称性和费米子系统的高效计算框架仍缺乏统一的、高性能的软件工具。
AI.method: 基于TensorKit.jl构建张量运算基础设施，实现支持阿贝尔/非阿贝尔对称性和费米子系统的iPEPS算法，包括基态求解、时间演化和有限温度模拟，兼容多种晶格几何结构。
AI.result: 通过多个算例和技术基准测试展示了PEPSKit.jl在基态、时间演化和有限温度模拟方面的能力，验证了其在不同物理对称性和晶格几何下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PEPSKit.jl为二维量子多体系统的高效iPEPS模拟提供了一个统一且功能全面的Julia软件框架，支持广泛的物理对称性和模拟场景。

title: Higher-order Weyl nodes driven by helical magnetic order in EuAgAs
summary: Magnetic topological semimetals provide a fertile ground for exploring how long-range magnetic order can alter electronic band structures and generate novel quasiparticles such as Weyl fermions. Here, we investigate the coupled magnetic and electronic structure of single-crystalline EuAgAs, a hexagonal pnictide whose magnetic ground state has remained elusive. Using neutron diffraction and resonant elastic X-ray scattering, we identify an unusual magnetic ordering sequence with two successive phase transitions at $T_\mathrm{N1} = 12$ K and $T_\mathrm{N2} = 8$ K. We observe two slightly different magnetic propagation vectors, one associated with $T_\mathrm{N1}$ and the other with $T_\mathrm{N2}$. Spherical neutron polarimetry reveals that the magnetic structure is a transverse helix aligned along the $c$ axis with a period that is approximately twice the $c$ lattice parameter. First-principles calculations for the helical phase predict subtle band folding effects and the emergence of effective higher-order Weyl nodes. These topological features appear near the calculated Fermi energy $E_{\mathrm{F}}$ which, however, lies above the position of $E_{\mathrm{F}}$ obtained from angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy so could not be probed in this study.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了EuAgAs单晶中耦合的磁性和电子结构，通过中子衍射和共振弹性X射线散射发现了12 K和8 K两个连续相变对应的两种略有不同的磁传播矢量，球形中子偏振测量揭示其为沿c轴的横向螺旋磁结构（周期约为两倍c晶格参数）。第一性原理计算预测螺旋相中存在能带折叠效应和有效高阶Weyl节点，但计算费米能级与ARPES实验值存在偏差，导致这些拓扑特征未能被实验探测。
AI.motivation: 探索磁性拓扑半金属中长程磁序如何改变电子能带结构并产生Weyl费米子等新型准粒子，同时解决EuAgAs长期未明的磁基态问题。
AI.method: 中子衍射、共振弹性X射线散射、球形中子偏振测量、第一性原理计算、角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）。
AI.result: 发现两个连续磁相变（TN1=12 K, TN2=8 K）对应两种略有差异的磁传播矢量；确认横向螺旋磁结构（沿c轴，周期≈2c）；理论预测螺旋相存在能带折叠和有效高阶Weyl节点，但计算EF与ARPES实测EF不匹配。
AI.conclusion: EuAgAs展现出独特的连续磁相变和横向螺旋磁序，是研究磁序与拓扑电子结构相互作用的潜力体系，但理论预测的拓扑特征需通过调节费米能级或寻找相似材料来进一步验证。

title: Orthogonal Decomposition of Discretization-Induced Transport-Information Cost under Rank-Deficient Parametrizations
summary: When we consider discretization of continuous probability distributions, it inevitably induces irreversible geometric distortion of local measure on the discretized support. While such discretziation-induced distortion is extrinsic to information geometry (IG) alone, we recently demonstrate that the discretization cost can be naturally characterized by the standard Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between continuous distributions as expectation of their infinitesimal parameter variations. The framework is based on the correspondence between optimal transport (OT) and IG, primarily requring the selected parameters directly identifiable with support coordinates. The present work extends the framework to more generalized parametrization theta, particularly the Jacobian between theta and support coordinates is rank-deficient, which generally results in breaking down the interpretation of the discretization-induced costs as information-geometric quantities. To address the problem, we here introduce an orthogonal decomposition of the second-moment tensor onto linear subspace for the covariance matrices generated by parameter fluctuations, based on Frobenius projection. The decomposition naturally separates the discretization cost into observable and unobservable components relative to the chosen parametrization. The present formulation provides a geometric framework for analyzing partial observability of discretization-induced transport-information costs and clarifies the role of parametrization-dependent information loss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Frobenius投影的正交分解方法，用于分析连续概率分布离散化时产生的信息几何畸变成本，特别是在参数化秩亏情况下的可观测与不可观测成分分离。
